use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF THROMBOCYTOPENIA IN ADULT PATIENTS WITH CHRONIC LIVER DISEASE WHO ARE SCHEDULED TO UNDERGO A PROCEDURE

indications.text:
MULPLETA is indicated for the treatment of thrombocytopenia in adult patients with chronic liver disease who are
scheduled to undergo a procedure.
